title: pycreus membranaceus
intro: Pycreus membranaceus, also known as the water fern or swamp grass, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pycreus membranaceus include treating fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as aiding in wound healing. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
